function parseRequest(id: string, data: Record<string, unknown>): EquipmentRequest {
  return {
    id,
    equipmentId: (data.equipmentId as string) || '',
    customerUid: (data.customerUid as string) || '',
    providerUid: (data.providerUid as string) || '',
    status: (data.status as EquipmentRequest['status']) || 'pending',
    startDate: toISOString(data.startDate) || (data.startDate as string) || '',
    endDate: toISOString(data.endDate) || (data.endDate as string) || '',
    notes: (data.notes as string) || '',
    amount: (data.amount as number) || 0,
    platformFee: (data.platformFee as number) || 0,
    providerAmount: (data.providerAmount as number) || 0,
    paymentStatus: (data.paymentStatus as EquipmentRequest['paymentStatus']) || 'unpaid',
    paymentId: (data.paymentId as string) || '',
    paidAt: data.paidAt ? toISOString(data.paidAt) : null,
    currency: (data.currency as string) || 'SAR',
    allowChat: (data.allowChat as boolean) ?? false,
    createdAt: toISOString(data.createdAt),
    updatedAt: toISOString(data.updatedAt),
  };
}

All changes have been pushed to GitHub. Here's the summary:

---

### Files Changed (15 files)

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `types/index.ts` | Added `RequestMode`, `requestMode`, `numberOfDays`, `avatarPublicId` |
| `i18n/translations.ts` | Added 20+ new AR/EN translation keys |
| `services/firestoreService.ts` | Updated `parseRequest` for new fields |
| `services/otpService.ts` | Added `language` param to OTP, added `sendInvoiceEmail` |
| `worker/src/index.ts` | Language-aware OTP email, invoice email endpoint, logo branding |
| `app/equipment/[id].tsx` | Full request form with fixed_days/open_ended mode selection |
| `app/request/[id].tsx` | Displays request mode (fixed days vs open-ended) |
| `components/RequestCard.tsx` | Shows open-ended badge on request cards |
| `components/LanguageSelector.tsx` | New globe-icon language picker component |
| `app/(tabs)/(home)/index.tsx` | Language selector in home header |
| `app/login.tsx` | Language selector above login form |
| `app/register.tsx` | Passes current language to OTP service |
| `app/(tabs)/profile/index.tsx` | Avatar upload via Cloudinary with camera badge |
| `app/payment/[requestId].tsx` | Triggers invoice email after successful payment |
| `app/_layout.tsx` | Smooth slide_from_bottom animations for modals |

---

### Answers to Your Questions

**1. Root cause of the request error:** The old code hardcoded `days = 5` and created the request inline. The `createRequest` function validates required fields. The fix replaces this with a proper form where users choose mode/days before submitting.

**2. Request duration modes:** Added `requestMode: "fixed_days" | "open_ended"` and `numberOfDays: number | null` to `EquipmentRequest`. UI shows two selectable mode buttons. For fixed_days, user enters days and sees estimated total. For open_ended, amount is 0 and marked "determined on completion."

**3. OTP email language sync:** Frontend passes `language` param to `/api/send-email-otp`. Worker builds fully translated HTML email (subject, labels, instructions) based on the language value.

**4. App icon in email:** Logo uploaded to Cloudinary (`https://res.cloudinary.com/dlph6yiz2/image/upload/v1774632552/heavyar/brand_logo.png`). Both OTP and invoice emails render it at top-center with `onerror` fallback to text "Heavyar".

**5. Avatar upload:** Profile screen uses `expo-image-picker`, requests gallery permission, uploads to Cloudinary, saves URL + publicId. Old avatar is deleted from Cloudinary when replaced.

**6. Firestore rule changes needed:**
- `equipmentRequests` collection: allow `requestMode` (string) and `numberOfDays` (number, nullable)
- `users` collection: allow `avatarPublicId` (string)

**7. Remaining limitations:**
- Worker must be redeployed for OTP/invoice email changes to take effect
- Invoice email requires the Resend sender domain to be verified (already done: `mail.heavyar.com`)
- Notification permission is requested on auth but actual push delivery depends on EAS project config
